name: cpp-unused-includes-remover
description: Automatically removes unused #include directives in C/C++ files on save, using clangd diagnostics (requires llvm-vs-code-extensions.vscode-clangd).

commands.title: C++: Remove Unused Includes in Current File
C++: Remove Unused Includes in Workspace

cppUnusedIncludes.enableOnSave.description: Automatically remove unused includes when saving a C/C++ file.

cppUnusedIncludes.diagnosticSource.description: The diagnostic source name to use for detecting unused includes. Default is "clangd".

cppUnusedIncludes.waitForDiagnosticsMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for clangd diagnostics before applying fixes on save.

cppUnusedIncludes.workspaceFileGlob.description: Glob pattern for files to process in the workspace-wide command.
